summary: The feature correctly converts the shared legacy JSON import launch handler to async/await and adds regression coverage proving both import entrypoints await FilePicker.pick_files.
evidence: Commit 761ec1b changes src/ui/app.py so show_import_project_dialog is async and awaits file_picker.pick_files(...), matching current Flet awaitable behavior.
tests/test_app.py now uses async stub pickers plus asyncio.run on both landing-page and project-view import buttons, and asserts awaited_pick_calls matches pick_calls.

Full-suite validation passed in current scrutiny run: uv run pytest tests/ -v => 551 passed; uv run ruff check src tests => All checks passed; configured typecheck is a no-op placeholder in .factory/services.yaml.
